programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Scratch Offs: Tappahannock Is for Lovers
programme.desc: With bonus features and pop-ups, David helps a couple who met as he was recovering from an injury find a dream home in Tappahannock, Virginia.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Serendipitous Journey From Atlanta to Valencia
programme.desc: After falling for its charm, a family decides to move from Atlanta to Valencia, Spain; they look to transition to Spanish life and remote work, but they must weigh the cultural allure of city living against what that will cost.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Hitting the Pause Button in Brasilito
programme.desc: A Virginia mother wants her daughter to experience a slower pace of life in Brasilito, Costa Rica; she's looking to escape a frantic, consumer-driven culture, but she may experience some sticker shock.

programme.title: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Three home makeover experts help Australian families declutter and organize their homes, sorting the trash from the treasure and helping them live happier lives.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.sub-title: Putting the Charm Back in the Farm
programme.desc: Shervin and Lindsey's farmhouse is the realization of a dream.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Katie and Dalton don't have time to take on the renovation that their 100-year-old farmhouse desperately needs; an injury has kept Dalton from finishing projects.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Farm Is
programme.desc: As Brad and Andrea's five daughters move out one by one, the empty nesters find themselves looking for a smaller nest.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brad and Katie's farmhouse is the realization of a dream; they always planned to raise their three kids in a farmhouse but until now, they just hadn't found the one.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Marianne and Ron plan to leave the big city and make the move to a farmhouse where they can entertain family and friends.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Hailey and Jason's farmhouse has been in Jason's family for three generations and now Jason and his family all call it home; despite the property's family history, there's nothing special about living in the farmhouse's cramped, neglected interior.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Ready vs. Reluctant in Espiritu Santo, Vanuatu
programme.desc: He plans to use the archipelago as a backdrop for his nature videos, but the lack of western amenities has her rethinking the move entirely.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Family Seeks Multigenerational Home in Costa Rica
programme.desc: A father-daughter team searches for a million-dollar multigenerational home on the jungle coast of Brasilito, Costa Rica; they have an extensive wish list in which an ocean view, a pool and separate guest quarters are all required.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Singing in the City, in Stockholm
programme.desc: After a health scare, a husband and wife look to fulfill their dream of living abroad in Stockholm, Sweden; he seeks the vibrancy of the city center, but space is hard to come by in town and she needs enough room to teach opera lessons from home.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: NYC Woman Seeks Love in Amsterdam
programme.desc: An NYC woman leaves everything for one last shot at finding love and starting a family in Amsterdam; she searches for her dream man as well as the dream apartment, but with Amsterdam's housing crunch, those dreams may be in jeopardy.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Single Mom Finds Her Calm in Siem Reap, Cambodia
programme.desc: A single mom looks to leave the Los Angeles grind to fully immerse herself in Cambodian culture. She plans to move to a neighborhood where her dollars can stretch further, but her tween daughter prefers the posh expat lifestyle in central Siem Reap.

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott & Bryan work on adding value to the property, while the teams take on two small but critical spaces, the front entry and main bathroom. These high-traffic areas demand clever functionality and must make a stellar first impression. It's a designer showdown as Chalon & Tatianna both swing for the fences, Marcy finds herself stretched beyond her comfort zone, and Taylor's indecision explodes into a full-blown wallpaper fiasco!

programme.desc: Two British families set up shop in Spain to sell property to Britain families looking for a bit of fun in the sun.

programme.sub-title: Feeling the Squeeze in Seoul, South Korea
programme.desc: A college graduate wants to move from Las Vegas to Seoul, South Korea to be with her long-distance boyfriend; the high cost of small apartments in Seoul and her limited budget might make it difficult.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple realize their closed-off layout and underutilized space don't work for their growing family; they call on Drew and Jonathan to transform the main floor and balance their modern aesthetic with child-friendly function.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple loves their 1950s home, but its dated layout prevents everyone from gathering in the same place; Drew and Jonathan revamp their floor plan and create a main living room, dining room and kitchen where the family can make memories.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A home's cramped, closed-off layout no longer functions for a young, growing family; with the help of the couple's spunky 6-year-old daughter, Drew and Jonathan step in to create a fresh, bright space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: After putting projects on hold to raise their family, a couple need help tackling half-finished projects; Drew and Jonathan overhaul several rooms to give the family a bright and cozy transformation they can share with friends and neighbors.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A comics-loving couple know their new home needs a super makeover, so they're living in the basement and haven't unpacked or bought furniture; Jonathan and Drew give several spaces a modern-yet-traditional transformation and help furnish the home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: After good neighbors helped them through a recent health scare, a couple do not want to leave their home, but they need more storage, flow and functionality; Drew and Jonathan transform the living room and kitchen, making a master retreat.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Mel and Roy have lost control of their home; their creative and energetic kids have turned the entire main floor into an art explosion that knows no boundaries; even the walls have turned into a kiddie canvas; feeling embarrassed and overwhelmed, no amount of effort seems to help; Kortney and Kenny sharpen their focus to create some order: a dedicated space for art, a reorganized kitchen, a tranquil room for adulting, and a proper dining room is finally born.

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: Teams compete to see who can renovate houses on Phillip Island for the most profit, as the properties are placed on auction soon after refurbishments are completed.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Following her divorce, an English mom of two looks for a new life and a new career as a private investigator on Australia's Sunshine Coast. She wants a home that's by the beach, but finding a place that meets her high standards may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
